title: Rotten flesh to leather - TaralloMC
description: This datapack add 3 simple ways to obtain leather
body:
This datapack add 3 ways to obtain leather:

By cooking it in a furnace.

By smoking it in a smoker.

And by putting it into a campfire.



Of course you can use it in your modpack, and credits will be appreciated!

Obviosy you can't redistibruite it.
